englishDefinitions: A medical imaging test in which barium is put into the rectum to help X-rays show the large intestine.
persianTranslation: آزمایش تصویربرداریِ رودهٔ بزرگ با باریم
examples: The doctor ordered a barium enema to examine the colon.
She was nervous before her barium enema appointment.
A barium enema can help detect abnormalities in the large intestine.
